rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex delimiters
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Place implementation-level bindings in the implementation annex
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool in const and eq declarations
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in contracts
Place component type contracts in type annexes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool in const and eq declarations
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not use invalid or unresolved identifiers in contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
